price: Da fanden wir in ihr aber nur ein (einziges) Haus von (Allah) Ergebenen.
arabic: فَمَا وَجَدۡنَا فِيهَا غَيۡرَ بَيۡتٖ مِّنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: famā wajadnā fīhā ghayra baytin mina al-mus'limīna
